rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Component type annexes are preferred for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
generic_rules: Preserve visible symbol scope when inserting AGREE contracts into AADL components
Use int, real, and bool as scalar type names in AGREE const and eq declarations
Output dependency guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings in AGREE require placement in component implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes for contracts
